programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Dr. Nikki Alexander and her team of pathologists return with new crime cases.Using the achievements of science and the possibilities of a modern laboratory, they will once again face difficult puzzles.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

programme.title: Ludwig
programme.desc: John 'Ludwig' Taylor lives in solitude, devoting himself to creating puzzles.His twin brother, Chief Inspector James Taylor, disappears.Taylor decides to find him and takes over his identity to do so.

credits.actor: Young John u0026 James Taylor - Jakub Bednarczyk

programme.title: Death in Paradise 15
programme.desc: Detective Mervin Wilson (Don Gilet) returns to the charming island of Saint Marie - a tropical corner of the Caribbean full of sun, which, however, hides numerous secrets beneath its idyllic surface.The investigator is still trying to find his place here.He is also taking on further criminal cases.He investigates, among other things, the circumstances of the poisoning of a local newspaper reporter, the alleged attack of a legendary beast on a lecturer, and the death of a professional killer.Additionally, he intervenes when the body of a couples therapist is found on the beach of a luxury resort.Additionally, an unexpected meeting with his stepbrother draws him into a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: Lewis 6
programme.desc: The adventures of Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox), who work together and try to solve the most complex crime mysteries.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: Lewis 6
programme.desc: The adventures of Detective Lewis (Kevin Whately) and Sergeant Hathaway (Laurence Fox), who work together and try to solve the most complex crime mysteries.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: Keeping up Appearances 4
programme.desc: Jacynta Bukiet (Patricia Routledge), a pretentious middle-aged woman, wants to be considered a classy woman who only moves in high circles.He does not admit his origins and is ashamed of his poor sisters - Róża and Stokrotka.She plays the lady to her calm and well-behaved neighbor Elizabeth (Josephine Tewson) and her brother Emmet (David Griffin).This leads to many comic situations.Jacinta's husband, Richard (Clive Swift), is embarrassed by his wife's behavior, but for peace of mind he puts up with all the strangeness.

programme.title: Keeping up Appearances 4
programme.desc: Jacynta Bukiet (Patricia Routledge), a pretentious middle-aged woman, wants to be considered a classy woman who only moves in high circles.He does not admit his origins and is ashamed of his poor sisters - Róża and Stokrotka.She plays the lady to her calm and well-behaved neighbor Elizabeth (Josephine Tewson) and her brother Emmet (David Griffin).This leads to many comic situations.Jacinta's husband, Richard (Clive Swift), is embarrassed by his wife's behavior, but for peace of mind he puts up with all the strangeness.

programme.title: Keeping up Appearances 4
programme.desc: Jacynta Bukiet (Patricia Routledge), a pretentious middle-aged woman, wants to be considered a classy woman who only moves in high circles.He does not admit his origins and is ashamed of his poor sisters - Róża and Stokrotka.She plays the lady to her calm and well-behaved neighbor Elizabeth (Josephine Tewson) and her brother Emmet (David Griffin).This leads to many comic situations.Jacinta's husband, Richard (Clive Swift), is embarrassed by his wife's behavior, but for peace of mind he puts up with all the strangeness.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: Father Brown 13
programme.desc: 1950s.Father Brown, a priest from the parish of Kembleford, solves complex crimes.He uses intuition and psychological knowledge to lead sinners to the right path.

programme.title: Call the Midwife 14
programme.desc: The fourteenth season of the series inspired by the memories of Jennifer Worth.1970. Nuns and midwives from Nonnatus House continue to support the inhabitants of the poor East End, where terrible living conditions and infectious diseases take their toll.Growing protests on the Isle of Dogs further complicate their daily work.The team faces exceptionally difficult challenges: a mysterious teenage pregnancy, a case of bipolar disorder, a gonorrhea infection and a dramatic childbirth, which put their knowledge and empathy to the test.

programme.title: Ludwig
programme.desc: John 'Ludwig' Taylor lives in solitude, devoting himself to creating puzzles.His twin brother, Chief Inspector James Taylor, disappears.Taylor decides to find him and takes over his identity to do so.

credits.actor: Young John u0026 James Taylor - Jakub Bednarczyk

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Dr. Nikki Alexander and her team of pathologists return with new crime cases.Using the achievements of science and the possibilities of a modern laboratory, they will once again face difficult puzzles.

programme.desc: The fourteenth season of the series inspired by the memories of Jennifer Worth.1970. Nuns and midwives from Nonnatus House continue to support the inhabitants of the poor East End, where terrible living conditions and infectious diseases take their toll.Growing protests on the Isle of Dogs further complicate their daily work.The team faces exceptionally difficult challenges: a mysterious teenage pregnancy, a case of bipolar disorder, a gonorrhea infection and a dramatic childbirth, which put their knowledge and empathy to the test.

programme.desc: Jacynta Bukiet (Patricia Routledge), a pretentious middle-aged woman, wants to be considered a classy woman who only moves in high circles.He does not admit his origins and is ashamed of his poor sisters - Róża and Stokrotka.She plays the lady to her calm and well-behaved neighbor Elizabeth (Josephine Tewson) and her brother Emmet (David Griffin).This leads to many comic situations.Jacinta's husband, Richard (Clive Swift), is embarrassed by his wife's behavior, but for peace of mind he puts up with all the strangeness.

programme.desc: Jacynta Bukiet (Patricia Routledge), a pretentious middle-aged woman, wants to be considered a classy woman who only moves in high circles.He does not admit his origins and is ashamed of his poor sisters - Róża and Stokrotka.She plays the lady to her calm and well-behaved neighbor Elizabeth (Josephine Tewson) and her brother Emmet (David Griffin).This leads to many comic situations.Jacinta's husband, Richard (Clive Swift), is embarrassed by his wife's behavior, but for peace of mind he puts up with all the strangeness.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 2
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry
Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: Father Brown 9
programme.desc: Another season of the series in which the charismatic priest, Father Brown (Mark Williams), investigates various criminal mysteries.They take place in the parish of Kembleford.

programme.title: Death in Paradise 15
programme.desc: Detective Mervin Wilson (Don Gilet) returns to the charming island of Saint Marie - a tropical corner of the Caribbean full of sun, which, however, hides numerous secrets beneath its idyllic surface.The investigator is still trying to find his place here.He is also taking on further criminal cases.He investigates, among other things, the circumstances of the poisoning of a local newspaper reporter, the alleged attack of a legendary beast on a lecturer, and the death of a professional killer.Additionally, he intervenes when the body of a couples therapist is found on the beach of a luxury resort.Additionally, an unexpected meeting with his stepbrother draws him into a series of unexpected events.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries 2
programme.desc: War veteran Dr. Lucien Blake (played by Craig McLachlan) returns to his hometown.He begins to support the local police in solving crimes.

credits.actor: Chief Supt Matthew Lawson - Joel Tobeck

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The fate of officers from the elite London unit.Investigators begin an investigation into the found bodies.They then investigate the death of a man who was killed during a bachelor party.

programme.title: London Kills
programme.desc: The fate of officers from the elite London unit.Investigators begin an investigation into the found bodies.They then investigate the death of a man who was killed during a bachelor party.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The further fate of Father Brown, who solves subsequent puzzles using his innate intuition and acquired psychological knowledge.In his work, he uses the experience gained over many years of service.

credits.actor: Chief Superintendent Jean Innocent - Rebecca Front

programme.title: My Life is Murder 2
programme.desc: The second season of the series.Alexa Crowe (Lucy Lawless) supports the charismatic Inspector Harry (Rawiri Jobe) and his partner Madison (Ebony Vagulans) in solving difficult crimes.

credits.actor: Detective Inspector Kieran Hussey - Bernard Curry

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.title: Midsomer Murders 10
programme.desc: The action of the series takes place in England, in the area known as Midsomer.Among the eccentric inhabitants of one of the local towns there are Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby (John Nettles), husband Joyce (Jane Wymark) and father Cully (Laura Howard), who are calm and composed in tracking down crimes.He is assisted by his junior assistant, Sergeant Gavin Troy (Daniel Casey).Detectives work together to solve complicated murder cases taking place in various nearby towns.The creators of the series were inspired by a series of books by the English writer Caroline Graham.In the seventh series, instead of Troy, Tom's new partner becomes Sergeant Dan Scott (John Hopkins), and in the ninth series - Sergeant Ben Jones (Jason Hughes).

credits.actor: Joyce Barnaby, żona Toma - Jane Wymark
sierżant Ben Jones, partner Barnaby'ego - Jason Hughes

programme.desc: The next fate of the British commissioner, Richard Poole (Ben Miller).The officer is sent to one of the Caribbean islands, where he works to investigate the circumstances of local murders.
